results.title: Acme Corp raises $50M Series C to expand AI platform
results.text: Acme Corp announced a $50M Series C round led by Benchmark. The funding will accelerate development of their AI-powered workflow platform targeting mid-market enterprises.
results.author: Jane Reporter

results.title: Acme Corp partners with major cloud provider on enterprise rollout
results.text: Acme Corp signed a strategic partnership with a major cloud provider to distribute its workflow automation tools to enterprise customers globally.
